title: Update module github.com/sigstore/fulcio to v1.8.5
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/sigstore/fulcio](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio) | `v1.8.1` → `v1.8.5` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fsigstore%2ffulcio/v1.8.5?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fsigstore%2ffulcio/v1.8.1/v1.8.5?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>sigstore/fulcio (github.com/sigstore/fulcio)</summary>

### [`v1.8.5`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#v185)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/compare/v1.8.4...v1.8.5)

#### Vulnerability Fixes

- <https://github.com/sigstore/fulcio/security/advisories/GHSA-59jp-pj84-45mr> - Server-side request forgery via MetaIssuer regex bypass ([#​2263](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2263))

### [`v1.8.4`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#v184)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/compare/v1.8.3...v1.8.4)

Same changelog as v1.8.3, with a few dependency bumps to resolve a breaking API change

### [`v1.8.3`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#v183)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/compare/v1.8.2...v1.8.3)

#### Vulnerability Fixes

- <https://github.com/sigstore/fulcio/security/advisories/GHSA-f83f-xpx7-ffpw>; prevents OOM condition due to malformed OIDC token ([#​2233](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2233))

#### Features

- feat: Add support for skipping email\_verified claim requirement per issuer ([#​2220](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2220))
- add meta-issuer circleci block ([#​2215](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2215))
- add circleci info to fulcio ([#​2192](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2192))

#### Testing

- Add basic E2E tests ([#​2230](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2230))

### [`v1.8.2`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#v182)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/compare/v1.8.1...v1.8.2)

#### Testing

- make email address in test cases rfc822 conformant ([#​2205](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2205))

</details>

---
